extra_fields.detailed_description: Identify all key stakeholders (internal teams, publisher, potential partners) and gather their needs, expectations, and requirements for the project. This includes conducting interviews and workshops.

Based on stakeholder input, define the core project objectives, including gameplay pillars, target audience, key features, and overall vision for the game. Ensure objectives are SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound).

Clearly document the project scope, outlining what is included and excluded from the project. Define all key deliverables, including milestones, prototypes, assets, and the final game product. Create a scope document for review.

Establish key performance indicators (KPIs) and success metrics to measure the project's progress and success. These metrics should align with the project objectives and be measurable throughout the development process. Examples include player engagement, sales figures, and critical reception.

Establish the organizational structure of the project team, including defining roles, responsibilities, and reporting lines for each team member. This involves identifying the necessary skills and expertise required for each role and creating a clear hierarchy to facilitate effective communication and decision-making.

Source and recruit qualified individuals to fill the defined roles within the project team. This includes creating job descriptions, posting job openings, screening resumes, conducting interviews, and making hiring decisions. The goal is to assemble a team with the necessary skills, experience, and cultural fit to successfully execute the project.

task_children.description: Onboard and Train New Team Members

extra_fields.detailed_description: Provide new team members with the necessary training and resources to effectively perform their roles. This includes introducing them to the project goals, scope, and objectives, providing training on relevant tools and technologies, and integrating them into the team culture. The goal is to ensure that new team members are quickly productive and contribute to the project's success.

Define clear communication channels and protocols for the project team to ensure effective information sharing and collaboration. This includes establishing regular team meetings, setting up communication tools (e.g., Slack, email), and defining guidelines for communication frequency and content. The goal is to facilitate open and transparent communication within the team.
Select and document the project management methodology (e.g., Agile, Waterfall, Hybrid) to be used throughout the project. This includes defining processes, workflows, and communication protocols.

Develop a comprehensive project schedule outlining all tasks, dependencies, milestones, and deadlines. Utilize project management software (e.g., Jira, Microsoft Project) to track progress and manage resources.
Define the communication channels, frequency, and stakeholders involved in project communication. This includes regular status meetings, progress reports, and escalation procedures.
Identify potential risks and develop mitigation strategies to minimize their impact on the project. This includes creating a risk register, assigning risk owners, and implementing contingency plans.
Establish quality assurance processes and standards to ensure the game meets the required quality levels. This includes defining testing procedures, acceptance criteria, and feedback loops.

Research and identify potential funding sources, including publisher advances, strategic partnerships, government grants, and private investors. This involves creating a comprehensive list of potential funding avenues and assessing their suitability for the project.

task_children.description: Prepare Funding Proposals and Pitch Decks

extra_fields.detailed_description: Develop compelling funding proposals and pitch decks tailored to each identified funding source. This includes outlining the project's vision, scope, budget, and potential return on investment. High-quality visuals and clear, concise language are essential.

Negotiate the terms and conditions of funding agreements and contracts with selected funding sources. This involves ensuring favorable terms for the project, protecting intellectual property rights, and complying with all relevant legal and regulatory requirements.

task_children.description: Secure Commitment Letters and Initial Disbursements

extra_fields.detailed_description: Obtain commitment letters from funding sources and secure initial disbursements of funds. This involves finalizing all necessary paperwork, coordinating with financial institutions, and ensuring timely receipt of funds to support project activities.

task_children.description: Analyze Market Trends and Competitor Strategies

extra_fields.detailed_description: Conduct thorough market research to identify current trends, emerging technologies, and competitor strategies in the open-world game genre. Analyze successful and unsuccessful game design choices to inform strategic decisions.

task_children.description: Define Core Pillars and Unique Selling Points

extra_fields.detailed_description: Establish the core pillars of the game, including gameplay mechanics, narrative themes, and world design. Identify unique selling points that differentiate the game from competitors and resonate with the target audience.

task_children.description: Determine Target Audience and Player Preferences

extra_fields.detailed_description: Identify the target audience for the game based on demographics, gaming habits, and preferences. Conduct surveys, focus groups, and data analysis to understand player expectations and desires.

Define key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure the success of the game, including player engagement, retention, and monetization. Set realistic targets for each KPI based on market benchmarks and project goals.

task_children.description: Outline Long-Term Vision and Expansion Plans

extra_fields.detailed_description: Develop a long-term vision for the game, including potential sequels, expansions, and spin-offs. Outline plans for post-launch content updates, community engagement, and ongoing support.

Objective: Determine the capabilities of various game engines (Unreal Engine, Unity, etc.) for the project's specific needs.
Scope: Evaluate engine features related to open-world environments, procedural generation, AI, and graphics fidelity.
Steps: Review engine documentation, conduct performance tests, and consult with engine experts.
Deliverables: A comparative analysis report of game engine capabilities.

Objective: Assess the suitability of different procedural generation tools for creating diverse and high-quality content.
Scope: Evaluate tools like Houdini, World Machine, and Substance Designer for terrain generation, asset creation, and environment design.
Steps: Conduct tool trials, create sample content, and evaluate performance.
Deliverables: A report on the strengths and weaknesses of different procedural generation tools.

Objective: Identify and evaluate AI frameworks that can be integrated into the game engine for realistic NPC behavior and dynamic interactions.
Scope: Evaluate AI frameworks like Behavior Designer, RAIN AI, and custom AI solutions.
Steps: Conduct framework trials, implement sample AI behaviors, and evaluate performance.
Deliverables: A report on the suitability of different AI frameworks for the project.

Objective: Evaluate different graphics rendering techniques and technologies to achieve next-gen visual fidelity.
Scope: Evaluate techniques like ray tracing, global illumination, and advanced shading models.
Steps: Conduct performance tests, create visual prototypes, and evaluate visual quality.
Deliverables: A report on the performance and visual quality of different graphics rendering techniques.

Determine the geographical boundaries and overall scale of the game world, considering factors like player travel time, density of points of interest, and technical limitations. Define key areas for handcrafted content versus procedurally generated content.
Create basic layouts for Los Angeles, Detroit, and Miami within the game engine to test navigation, scale, and visual style. Focus on capturing the unique characteristics of each city.
Evaluate different procedural generation tools and techniques for creating terrain, buildings, and other world elements. Determine which tools best fit the project's needs and budget.

Calculate the number of assets (buildings, vehicles, props, etc.) required to populate the game world. Estimate the time and resources needed to create these assets, considering both handcrafted and procedurally generated content.

Identify potential technical limitations that could impact the world design, such as memory usage, draw calls, and streaming performance. Conduct performance tests to ensure the game runs smoothly on target hardware.
Establish the boundaries and objectives for procedural content generation, including the types of content to be generated, the level of detail required, and the overall aesthetic style.

task_children.description: Select Procedural Generation Tools and Tech

extra_fields.detailed_description: Evaluate and select the appropriate tools and technologies for procedural content generation, considering factors such as performance, ease of use, integration with the game engine, and the ability to generate diverse and high-quality content.
Design and implement the algorithms that will be used to generate procedural content, ensuring that they are efficient, scalable, and capable of producing a wide range of variations.

task_children.description: Integrate Procedural Content into Game World

extra_fields.detailed_description: Integrate the procedurally generated content into the game world, ensuring that it seamlessly blends with handcrafted elements and that it is properly optimized for performance.

Conduct thorough testing of the procedurally generated content, gathering player feedback and making adjustments to the algorithms and integration to improve the quality, diversity, and overall player experience.

task_children.description: Research moral choices in similar games

extra_fields.detailed_description:
Objective: Understand how moral choices impact player engagement and reception in comparable titles.
Scope: Review existing literature, analyze game mechanics, and gather player feedback.
Steps: Identify relevant games, document moral systems, and conduct player surveys.
Deliverables: A comprehensive report on moral choices in similar games.

Objective: Assess the potential for cultural insensitivity or offense in proposed game themes.
Scope: Review themes for potential biases, stereotypes, or misrepresentations.
Steps: Consult with cultural sensitivity experts, conduct focus groups, and analyze feedback.
Deliverables: A report identifying potential cultural sensitivity issues and recommendations for mitigation.

Objective: Determine how moral ambiguity affects player engagement and retention.
Scope: Create scenarios with varying degrees of moral ambiguity and measure player reactions.
Steps: Develop prototypes, conduct playtesting sessions, and analyze player data.
Deliverables: A report on the impact of moral ambiguity on player engagement.

task_children.description: Gather player feedback on moral themes

extra_fields.detailed_description:
Objective: Collect player opinions and reactions to proposed moral themes and choices.
Scope: Conduct surveys, focus groups, and interviews to gather qualitative and quantitative data.
Steps: Design surveys, recruit participants, and analyze responses.
Deliverables: A comprehensive report summarizing player feedback on moral themes.
Design and implement a basic prototype for core combat mechanics, including melee, shooting, and cover systems. Focus on responsiveness and player feel.
Develop a prototype for vehicle handling, including driving, drifting, and collisions. Experiment with different physics models to achieve a satisfying driving experience.
Create a simplified heist scenario, including planning, execution, and escape phases. Focus on core mechanics like stealth, hacking, and combat.
Develop a prototype for NPC interaction, including dialogue, reactions, and basic AI behaviors. Focus on creating believable and engaging NPC encounters.
Conduct playtesting sessions with internal and external testers to gather feedback on the core gameplay mechanics. Iterate on the prototypes based on the feedback received.

Create detailed city layouts for Los Angeles, Detroit, and Miami, considering geographical accuracy, iconic landmarks, and distinct architectural styles. This includes planning road networks, building placements, and points of interest.

Create and refine procedural generation algorithms to populate the open world with diverse and realistic environments, including buildings, vegetation, and terrain. Focus on balancing automation with artistic control to ensure quality and avoid repetition.

Design and build detailed, handcrafted locations and landmarks that are central to the game's narrative and gameplay. These areas should be visually stunning and offer unique experiences for players to explore.
Seamlessly integrate handcrafted locations and landmarks with the procedurally generated environment. Ensure smooth transitions, consistent visual quality, and a cohesive overall world design.

Optimize the open world environment for performance across various hardware configurations. This includes optimizing assets, implementing level of detail (LOD) systems, and utilizing efficient rendering techniques to maintain a smooth frame rate.

task_children.description: Outline main story arc and themes

extra_fields.detailed_description: Define the overarching narrative, key themes (crime, corruption, power), and moral conflicts that drive the game's story.
Create detailed profiles for main characters, including their histories, relationships, and motivations for their actions within the game world.
Craft engaging mission scripts and dialogues that advance the main story and side narratives, ensuring consistency with character personalities and world lore.
Seamlessly integrate the main story and side narratives into the open-world environment, creating a cohesive and immersive player experience.
Conduct thorough reviews of all narrative content, including scripts, dialogues, and character backstories, to ensure quality, consistency, and alignment with the game's overall vision.

Define distinct character archetypes relevant to the game's setting and narrative. Develop detailed backstories for key characters, including motivations, relationships, and personal histories. Ensure character designs align with the game's overall tone and themes.

Create 3D models for all characters, including main characters, supporting characters, and NPCs. Rig the models for animation, ensuring realistic movement and facial expressions. Optimize models for performance within the game engine.

Develop a library of animations for character movements, including walking, running, fighting, and interacting with the environment. Create facial animations to convey emotions and dialogue. Implement motion capture technology to enhance realism.

Program character behaviors and interactions within the game world. Design AI for NPCs to create believable and engaging interactions with the player. Implement dialogue systems and branching conversations.

Conduct thorough testing of character models, animations, and behaviors. Gather player feedback on character designs and interactions. Iterate on character implementation based on testing results and feedback.

Define distinct NPC behavior patterns based on social class, occupation, and location within the game world. This includes creating detailed profiles for each archetype, outlining their daily routines, interactions with other NPCs, and reactions to player actions.

Develop and integrate AI pathfinding algorithms that allow NPCs to navigate the open world realistically and efficiently. This includes implementing obstacle avoidance, dynamic path recalculation, and support for various locomotion types (walking, driving, etc.).

Design and implement a system that allows NPCs to react dynamically to player actions and environmental changes. This includes creating dialogue trees, animation sets, and AI behaviors that respond to player choices, time of day, weather conditions, and other in-game events.

Conduct thorough testing of the AI system to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks. This includes optimizing AI algorithms, reducing memory usage, and ensuring that the AI system scales effectively with the number of NPCs in the game world.
Create 3D models of various vehicles, ensuring visual fidelity and adherence to technical specifications. This includes modeling interiors, exteriors, and customizable parts.
Develop detailed 3D models of weapons, focusing on realism and functionality. This involves creating high-resolution textures and ensuring proper animation rigging.

Design and create a wide range of props to populate the game world, including furniture, street objects, and environmental details. Focus on creating assets that are both visually appealing and optimized for performance.
Optimize all created assets to ensure they meet the game's performance requirements. This includes reducing polygon counts, optimizing textures, and implementing LOD (Level of Detail) systems.
Integrate all created and optimized assets into the game engine, ensuring proper placement, functionality, and visual consistency within the game world.

Define various heist scenarios, including target locations, objectives, difficulty levels, and potential rewards. Outline the steps required to complete each heist and the challenges players will face.

Develop a user interface that allows players to plan and customize their heists, including selecting crew members, choosing equipment, and setting waypoints. Ensure the interface is intuitive and easy to use.

Create AI behaviors for both player-controlled crew members and non-player characters (NPCs) involved in heists. Ensure that AI characters can effectively execute heist plans, react to changing circumstances, and engage in combat when necessary.

Conduct thorough testing of heist mechanics to identify and address any bugs, exploits, or balance issues. Adjust difficulty levels, rewards, and AI behaviors to ensure that heists are challenging but fair and rewarding.
Design the user interface and user experience for the vehicle customization system, ensuring it is intuitive and engaging for players.
Develop and implement the visual customization options for vehicles, including paint colors, decals, body kits, and rims.
Develop and implement the performance upgrade system for vehicles, including engine upgrades, suspension modifications, and brake improvements.
Thoroughly test the vehicle customization system to ensure it is functioning correctly and that all options are working as intended.

Establish the foundational rules and variables that govern the in-game criminal economies. This includes defining the types of criminal activities, their profitability, risk factors, and impact on the overall game world.

Create simulations to test the defined parameters and predict the behavior of the criminal economies under various conditions. This involves using software tools to model supply and demand, inflation, and other economic factors.

Integrate the simulated economic models into the game engine, creating functional systems that allow players to participate in and influence the criminal economies. This includes coding the necessary scripts and interfaces.

Fine-tune the economic systems to ensure that players have meaningful agency within the criminal economies while also facing realistic constraints and consequences for their actions. This involves adjusting parameters based on playtesting and feedback.

Identify and address potential exploits that could disrupt the criminal economies, such as loopholes that allow players to generate excessive wealth or manipulate the market. This involves implementing anti-cheat mechanisms and monitoring player behavior.

Establish the core principles and values that will guide the development of the morality system. This includes determining the scope of moral choices, the types of consequences that will result from player actions, and the overall tone and message that the system will convey.

Develop a working prototype of the morality system to test its functionality and identify potential issues. This includes implementing the core mechanics for tracking player morality, triggering consequences based on player actions, and providing feedback to the player on their moral standing.

Conduct playtesting sessions with target audience to gather feedback on the morality system. This includes observing player behavior, collecting survey data, and conducting focus groups to understand player perceptions of the system's fairness, engagement, and impact on the overall gameplay experience.

Based on playtesting feedback, iterate and refine the morality system to address any issues and improve its overall effectiveness. This includes adjusting the mechanics for tracking player morality, modifying the consequences of player actions, and enhancing the feedback provided to the player.
Define the network architecture, server infrastructure, and communication protocols for the multiplayer modes.
Develop the systems for synchronizing player positions, actions, and states across the network.
Create the system for matching players into games based on skill, region, and game mode preferences.
Integrate anti-cheat systems to prevent hacking and unfair gameplay in multiplayer modes.
Conduct extensive testing to identify and resolve performance issues in multiplayer modes, including latency, bandwidth, and server stability.
Create comprehensive test cases covering all game functionalities.
Run test cases and document any bugs or issues found.
Log all identified bugs in a bug tracking system.
Confirm that reported bugs have been resolved by developers.
Ensure that bug fixes haven't introduced new issues.
Use profiling tools to identify performance bottlenecks in CPU, GPU, and memory usage. Objective is to pinpoint areas needing optimization.
resources_needed: Performance profiling tools (e.g., NVIDIA Nsight, RenderDoc)

extra_fields.detailed_description: Refactor inefficient code, optimize algorithms, and reduce unnecessary computations to improve performance. Scope includes all game systems.
Reduce the size and complexity of game assets (textures, models, audio) to minimize memory usage and improve rendering performance. Deliverables include optimized assets.
Create a range of graphics settings that allow players to adjust visual quality based on their hardware capabilities. Objective is to ensure smooth gameplay on various systems.
Conduct performance testing on a variety of target hardware configurations to ensure the game meets performance benchmarks. Deliverables include performance reports.
Define the scope, objectives, and methodology for security testing, including the types of tests to be performed (e.g., penetration testing, vulnerability scanning) and the tools to be used.

Simulate real-world attacks to identify vulnerabilities in the game's code, network infrastructure, and server-side components. This includes testing for common web application vulnerabilities, such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting.
Use automated tools to scan the game's code and infrastructure for known vulnerabilities. This includes scanning for outdated software, misconfigurations, and other security weaknesses.

Review the results of penetration testing and vulnerability scanning to identify and prioritize security vulnerabilities. This includes assessing the severity of each vulnerability and determining the potential impact on the game and its players.
Develop and implement fixes for identified security vulnerabilities. This includes patching code, updating software, and reconfiguring systems to improve security.
Design and distribute surveys to gather quantitative data on player experiences, preferences, and pain points. Analyze survey results to identify trends and areas for improvement.

task_children.description: Organize Focus Groups for Qualitative Feedback

extra_fields.detailed_description: Recruit representative player groups for focus group sessions. Facilitate discussions to gather in-depth qualitative feedback on specific game features and mechanics. Document key insights and recommendations.
Collect and analyze in-game telemetry data to understand player behavior, identify areas of high engagement and frustration, and track key performance indicators (KPIs).
Synthesize feedback from surveys, focus groups, and telemetry data. Prioritize issues and opportunities based on impact and feasibility. Develop a plan for iterative improvements and updates.

Objective: Ensure the game adheres to ESRB and PEGI rating guidelines.
Scope: Review all game content (narrative, gameplay, art) against ESRB and PEGI standards.
Steps: 1. Obtain the latest ESRB and PEGI guidelines. 2. Conduct a thorough review of the game content. 3. Document any potential violations.
Deliverables: Compliance report detailing any areas of concern.

Objective: Verify that the game's data handling practices comply with GDPR and CCPA regulations.
Scope: Review all aspects of data collection, storage, and usage within the game.
Steps: 1. Review GDPR and CCPA regulations. 2. Map data flows within the game. 3. Assess compliance with data privacy principles. 4. Document any non-compliance issues.
Deliverables: Data handling compliance report.

Objective: Implement necessary features to ensure player data privacy.
Scope: Develop and integrate features such as data access requests, data deletion options, and consent management.
Steps: 1. Design data privacy features. 2. Develop and test the features. 3. Integrate the features into the game. 4. Document the implementation.
Deliverables: Implemented data privacy features.

Objective: Create comprehensive documentation of all compliance procedures.
Scope: Document all processes related to ESRB, PEGI, GDPR, and CCPA compliance.
Steps: 1. Document existing compliance procedures. 2. Identify any gaps in documentation. 3. Create new documentation as needed. 4. Review and approve all documentation.
Deliverables: Complete set of compliance documentation.

task_children.description: Research Target Audience and Market Trends

extra_fields.detailed_description: Conduct thorough research to identify the target audience, understand their preferences, and analyze current market trends in the gaming industry. This includes analyzing competitor marketing strategies and identifying potential opportunities.

task_children.description: Define Key Marketing Messages and Themes

extra_fields.detailed_description: Based on the market research, define the key marketing messages and themes that will resonate with the target audience. This includes identifying the unique selling points of the game and crafting compelling narratives.

Determine the most effective marketing channels and platforms to reach the target audience. This includes evaluating the reach, cost, and engagement potential of various channels, such as social media, online advertising, influencer marketing, and traditional media.

Create a detailed marketing budget that allocates resources to each marketing channel and activity. This includes estimating the cost of advertising, content creation, public relations, and other marketing expenses.

task_children.description: Create a Marketing Timeline and Schedule

extra_fields.detailed_description: Develop a comprehensive marketing timeline and schedule that outlines the key marketing activities and milestones leading up to the game's release. This includes setting deadlines for content creation, campaign launches, and media outreach.

Develop compelling trailers, gameplay videos, and high-resolution screenshots showcasing the game's key features and environments. This includes capturing in-game footage, editing, and adding visual effects.

task_children.description: Manage social media and community engagement

extra_fields.detailed_description: Create and curate engaging content for social media platforms (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok). Respond to community inquiries, moderate discussions, and run contests and giveaways to build hype and generate excitement.

task_children.description: Coordinate press releases and media outreach

extra_fields.detailed_description: Draft and distribute press releases to gaming news outlets, websites, and influencers. Pitch story ideas and secure interviews with key members of the development team to generate positive media coverage.
Plan and execute paid advertising campaigns on platforms like Google Ads, social media, and gaming websites. Optimize ad targeting and bidding strategies to maximize reach and conversions.

Plan and execute promotional events, such as game demos at conventions, online streams, and collaborations with other brands or influencers. Secure partnerships to cross-promote the game to new audiences.

task_children.description: Finalize Game Build and Master Discs

extra_fields.detailed_description: Compile the final game build, create master discs for distribution, and verify the integrity of the build.
Submit the game build to platform holders (Sony, Microsoft, Steam, etc.) for certification and approval.
Set up the game on digital distribution platforms (Steam, PlayStation Store, Xbox Marketplace, etc.) with appropriate metadata, pricing, and release dates.
Manage the logistics of physical game distribution, including manufacturing, packaging, shipping, and retail partnerships.

task_children.description: Prepare Day-One Patch and Server Infrastructure

extra_fields.detailed_description: Develop and test a day-one patch to address any last-minute bugs or issues, and ensure the server infrastructure is ready to handle the expected player load.

task_children.description: Finalize Game Build and Master Discs

extra_fields.detailed_description: Create the gold master build, verify its integrity, and prepare physical master discs for distribution.
Ensure servers are properly configured, load balanced, and ready to handle launch day player traffic. Monitor server performance and address any issues.
Set up help desks, FAQs, and support staff to handle player inquiries and technical issues during launch.

task_children.description: Coordinate with Platform Holders (Sony, Microsoft, PC)

extra_fields.detailed_description: Ensure the game is properly submitted and approved on all target platforms. Address any last-minute certification requirements.

task_children.description: Monitor Social Media and Community Forums

extra_fields.detailed_description: Track player sentiment, identify emerging issues, and respond to player feedback in real-time.

Objective: Collect and analyze player reviews from various sources (e.g., Steam, Metacritic, forums) to identify common issues and sentiments. Scope: Cover all available player feedback channels. Steps: 1. Set up data collection tools. 2. Categorize and tag reviews. 3. Identify recurring themes. Deliverables: Summary report of player feedback.

Objective: Continuously monitor server performance metrics to identify and address any stability issues. Scope: Cover all game servers and related infrastructure. Steps: 1. Set up server monitoring tools. 2. Define performance thresholds. 3. Respond to alerts. Deliverables: Server performance reports and incident logs.

Objective: Identify and fix critical bugs and exploits that affect gameplay or security. Scope: Cover all reported bugs and potential exploits. Steps: 1. Prioritize bug reports. 2. Investigate and reproduce bugs. 3. Develop and test fixes. Deliverables: Bug fixes and patch notes.

Objective: Analyze in-game economy data and adjust parameters to maintain balance and prevent exploits. Scope: Cover all aspects of the in-game economy. Steps: 1. Collect and analyze economic data. 2. Identify imbalances. 3. Adjust parameters. Deliverables: Updated economy parameters and analysis reports.

Objective: Develop contingency content updates to address player concerns and maintain engagement. Scope: Cover potential content updates based on player feedback. Steps: 1. Brainstorm content ideas. 2. Prioritize content based on feedback. 3. Develop content plans. Deliverables: Content update plans and schedules.

Objective: Efficiently categorize and prioritize incoming bug reports based on severity, impact, and frequency.
Scope: Review all new bug reports, assign priority levels, and route to appropriate development teams.
Steps: 1. Establish a bug triage team. 2. Define severity and impact criteria. 3. Implement a bug tracking system. 4. Conduct daily triage meetings. 5. Assign bugs to developers.
Deliverables: Prioritized bug backlog.

Objective: Confirm the existence and behavior of reported bugs in a controlled environment.
Scope: Attempt to reproduce bugs reported by testers and players, gather additional information, and document reproduction steps.
Steps: 1. Set up a test environment. 2. Follow reproduction steps. 3. Document results. 4. Gather system information. 5. Verify bug behavior.
Deliverables: Verified bug reports with reproduction steps.

Objective: Create and test solutions to address identified bugs.
Scope: Develop code fixes, conduct unit tests, and integrate fixes into the game build.
Steps: 1. Analyze bug reports. 2. Develop code fixes. 3. Conduct unit tests. 4. Integrate fixes. 5. Test fixes in isolation.
Deliverables: Code fixes and unit test results.

Objective: Incorporate bug fixes into the main game build and validate their effectiveness.
Scope: Integrate code fixes, conduct regression testing, and verify that fixes do not introduce new issues.
Steps: 1. Integrate code fixes. 2. Conduct regression testing. 3. Verify fix effectiveness. 4. Monitor for new issues. 5. Document validation results.
Deliverables: Validated bug fixes integrated into the game build.

Objective: Properly document the resolution of bugs and close out bug reports in the tracking system.
Scope: Update bug reports with fix details, verification results, and closure status.
Steps: 1. Update bug reports. 2. Document fix details. 3. Verify closure criteria. 4. Close bug reports. 5. Archive bug reports.
Deliverables: Closed bug reports with complete documentation.
Brainstorm and develop compelling themes and storylines for the DLC, ensuring they align with the main game's narrative and player expectations. Define the scope and objectives of each DLC pack.

task_children.description: Design New Gameplay Mechanics and Features

extra_fields.detailed_description: Design and prototype new gameplay mechanics, weapons, vehicles, or other features that will be included in the DLC. Ensure these additions are balanced and integrate seamlessly with the existing game systems.
Develop new environments, characters, vehicles, weapons, and other assets required for the DLC. Optimize assets for performance and ensure they meet the game's visual quality standards.
Integrate the new assets, mechanics, and storylines into the game. Conduct thorough testing to identify and fix bugs, balance gameplay, and ensure a smooth player experience.
Prepare marketing materials, build the DLC package, and release it on all target platforms. Monitor player feedback and provide ongoing support.

Objective: Efficiently categorize and prioritize incoming player support tickets.
Scope: Includes all channels (email, forums, in-game).
Steps: Review each ticket, assign severity, route to appropriate team.
Deliverables: Prioritized queue of support tickets.

task_children.description: Respond to player inquiries and issues

extra_fields.detailed_description:
Objective: Provide timely and helpful responses to player inquiries and resolve technical issues.
Scope: Covers a wide range of topics, from gameplay questions to bug reports.
Steps: Investigate issues, provide solutions, escalate complex problems.
Deliverables: Resolved player issues, satisfied players.

task_children.description: Escalate complex issues to development team

extra_fields.detailed_description:
Objective: Ensure that complex technical issues are addressed by the development team.
Scope: Includes bugs, exploits, and other game-breaking problems.
Steps: Gather detailed information, document steps to reproduce, submit to developers.
Deliverables: Detailed bug reports for developers.

Objective: Track player sentiment and identify emerging trends and issues.
Scope: Includes forums, social media, and in-game feedback.
Steps: Monitor channels, analyze data, identify key themes.
Deliverables: Reports on player sentiment and feedback.

task_children.description: Monitor Player Feedback and Plan Updates
Collect player feedback from multiple sources

extra_fields.detailed_description: Gather player feedback from in-game surveys, forums, social media, and reviews to understand player sentiment and identify areas for improvement.

task_children.description: Analyze feedback and identify key trends

extra_fields.detailed_description: Analyze the collected feedback to identify recurring themes, prioritize issues, and understand the impact of different gameplay elements on player satisfaction.

task_children.description: Prioritize updates based on player feedback

extra_fields.detailed_description: Prioritize potential updates and changes based on the severity and frequency of reported issues, as well as the potential impact on player engagement and retention.

task_children.description: Create update roadmap and communicate plans

extra_fields.detailed_description: Develop a roadmap for future updates based on prioritized feedback and communicate these plans to the player community to manage expectations and build anticipation.
Monitor the impact of released updates on player satisfaction, engagement, and retention, and use this data to inform future updates and improvements.
